segments.speaker: 题目23/24
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a classroom. I have some updates regarding the schedule for your upcoming assignments. The deadline for your research paper has been extended to next Friday, giving you an extra week to incorporate my feedback on your outline. Additionally, the date for your group presentations has been moved to the following Monday to allow you more time to practice. These changes are intended to help reduce stress during a busy part of the semester. If you have questions, visit me during office hours or send me an email.
